content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Book is 74% deployed with 9 CNC positions and zero SLs set — position management is the priority, not new entries. Most held names are sitting on fresh post-earnings rallies (MAHABANK, PNBHOUSING, TORNTPOWER, NESTLEIND, AUBANK all near 52w highs) so the risk is giving back unrealized gains. India VIX at 18.7 is elevated; Nifty flat on the session.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.50,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat with NIM 3.95% and GNPA 1.45% is a strong fundamental backdrop; HDFC Sec target Rs 90. Stock made a fresh 52w high at 79.84 today before fading to 78.50. Setting SL at 74.50 (just below 20-DMA band / recent swing near 72.5 pivot with buffer) caps downside to ~5% from entry. Target 88 (~8% upside) gives 1.8:1 R:R from CMP."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 940.00,
      "new_target": 1120.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4: GNPA below 1% first time, AUM +15.3%, ICICI Sec upgraded to BUY with TP Rs 1,350. Stock +9% post-result on Apr 21 and holding above 980 today. SL at 940 is just below yesterday's low of 899 area consolidation top, capping risk to ~4.5%. Target 1120 is just below 52w high 1141. R:R ~2.5:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 118.50,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Gold hedge vs elevated VIX/macro risk. Pulled back slightly but above 20-DMA 121.9. SL at 118.50 caps downside to ~5%; target 135 is midway to 52w high 148. Keeping as portfolio hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 1580.00,
      "new_target": 1850.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Broke out above 52w high with Nabha Power acquisition catalyst; Q4 on May. Power cluster leadership. SL 1580 is just below today's low 1645 + prior day close zone, locks in ~4% buffer above entry and limits risk to ~4% on CMP. Target 1850 (below consensus 2000 band). R:R ~2:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 1350.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Massive Q4 beat (+27% PAT, +23% revenue, 18% vol growth) drove gap to 52w high. But valuation 70-80x P/E and post-earnings momentum can fade fast. Tight SL 1350 (~4.4% below CMP, just below prior close breakout zone). Target 1500 is conservative ~6.5%. Shorter hold window given overbought."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 995.00,
      "new_target": 1140.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Fresh 52w high; strong provisional Q4 business update (advances +25%, deposits +23%). Q4 earnings event Apr 25 — binary risk 2 days out. SL 995 is just below today's low and prior consolidation top, limits risk to ~5%. Target 1140 (brokerage range midpoint). Will reassess post-results."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 645.00,
      "new_target": 760.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Fresh 52w high, 3.7x volume, Q4 results Apr 29 (binary event). ICICI Direct TP 770. SL at 645 is below 20-DMA / prior consolidation around 650, limits risk to ~6%. Target 760. R:R ~2:1. Must reassess before earnings."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 2270.00,
      "new_target": 2550.00,
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "FMCG rotation trade supported by Nestle's blowout print. HUL Q4 on Apr 30. Breakout candle today (+6.5% off 20-DMA). SL 2270 just below today's open/breakout level, risk ~4.5%. Target 2550, R:R ~2:1. Exit before or around results."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "new_target": 430.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Power cluster defensive leg. Near 52w high after breaking long-term trendline. Q4 on May 15. SL 385 is below 20-DMA 378 zone / recent breakout level, risk ~4%. Target 430 (brokerage consensus upper band). R:R ~1.5:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 214.00,
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CANCEL the pending ADANIPOWER BUY LIMIT 214 placed 26+ hours ago. Thesis deteriorated: (1) stock is already 74% deployed — adding would breach buffer, (2) this would make it a 3rd power-cluster name (TORNTPOWER + NTPC already held) — cluster risk flagged by rules, (3) ADANIPOWER is at all-time high post a 21%/9-session rip with shooting-star candle on Apr 20 and Q4 on Apr 29 — chasing into earnings is poor R:R, (4) Q3 PAT was -19% YoY — core earnings softening despite rally. Cancel pending order; do not re-enter."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.50,
      "reasoning": "Lock in stop below pivot support 72 and 20-DMA band."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 940.00,
      "reasoning": "SL just below post-result consolidation; protect modest gain with wide enough buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 118.50,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge; keep SL wide to allow volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1580.00,
      "reasoning": "Breakout + M&A catalyst; SL below today's low protects gains."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1350.00,
      "reasoning": "Overbought post-result gap; tight SL given rich valuation."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 995.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 binary event Apr 25. Tight SL; will reassess post-print."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 645.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 on Apr 29; strong momentum but event risk imminent."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2270.00,
      "reasoning": "FMCG rotation play; Q4 Apr 30 — exit before results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive power leg; SL at breakout zone."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "PIRAMALFIN, DEEPAKNTR, ELECON — all big gap-ups with no fundamental catalyst in my deep-dive data; waiting for confirmation candle and avoid chasing. MANKIND pharma — track for cleaner entry if it pulls back to 2150 area. DRREDDY/CIPLA/AUROPHARMA — healthcare cluster strength; GRANULES already held, no need to stack more pharma. ADANIPOWER — cancel pending and avoid adding to power cluster (already 2 names). WHIRLPOOL — bearish sentiment from research, skip. TRITURBINE volume anomaly — unclear, pass.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 74% deployed — at the upper end of comfort. No new entries this cycle; all effort on risk management. Critical gap identified: all 9 positions had SL=0 on broker side — this tick sets SLs on every position. Two binary earnings events in my held book this week: AUBANK (Apr 25) and GRANULES (Apr 29); if conviction wanes, trim before results. Financial cluster exposure (MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK) is ~27% of capital — at the cluster threshold, do not add another bank/NBFC. Power cluster (TORNTPOWER + NTPC) ~11% — cancelling ADANIPOWER pending keeps this in check. Cumulative P&L barely negative; priority is not to give back the post-result run-ups that are already in unrealized gains."
}
